items.title: AI STM publishes its NIS2COMPASS introduction
items.summary: AI STM Learning explains the evidence-linked AI approach, the need for human review, and how smaller organizations can organize NIS2 compliance evidence.
items.source_label: Read on the AI STM website

items.title: SmartClover publishes the first NIS2COMPASS article
items.summary: SmartClover introduces the project through the practical problem of turning cybersecurity work into evidence that another person can inspect and verify.

items.title: NIS2COMPASS implementation period begins
items.summary: The eight-month NIS2COMPASS project starts with project controls, evidence practices, CYberSynchrony alignment work, and a public dissemination baseline.
items.source_label: See the CYberSynchrony open calls page

items.title: CYberSynchrony publishes framework and module results
items.summary: CYberSynchrony made public deliverables available for its six-module framework and initial technical results. These publications describe project capabilities; they do not mean that every module is a downloadable open-source software package.
